Work Experience

JUL 2019 – PRESENT

Software Developer

Erfinder Philippines, Tacloban City
  • Helped in the development of PIIOX, an open, modular platform designed for control and automation systems
  • Helped in the development of TESSA, a tool that automates the execution of scientific software applications. Supports workflows for data analysis, numerical simulation, and visualization.
  • Developed internal ERP system for Climeo AG.
  • Developed a management tool for Climeo AG IoT devices and clients.
  • Developed several internal applications for Stadler, Inc.
  • Created social media pages and chatbots for various clients.
Technical Details
C C# Python Docker SQLAlchemy REST WebSocket Xojo Integromat/Make Photoshop Premiere
Reference: PIIOX Reference: TESSA
NOV 2016 – 2018

Android Developer

Hyperworks I.T. Solutions, Tacloban City
  • Developed Disaster Risk Reduction (DRR) mobile apps, as well as educational mobile apps for Save The Children Philippines and DepEd.
  • Facilitated mobile features development workshops and data collection.
  • Conducted consultation and meeting with DepEd key persons.
  • Provided technical support and training for mobile app development.
  • Assisted in the development of the website and hosting of the mobile applications and tools.
Technical Details

Video: School Watching Application (SWApp)
2015 – 2016

JUL 2016 – DEC 2016

On The Job Training

Department of Agrarian Reforms, Tacloban City
  • Developed a document management system for the department as replacement of the previous system.
  • Provided training and support for the new system to the department staff.
  • Assisted in the migration of data from the old system to the new system.
  • Provided technical support and maintenance for the new system.
  • Improved the system to handle large volumes of data, faster referencing, and scanning capabilities for documents.
